title: Clear remaining visible CodeQL thread on PR 295
description: Remove the still-visible CodeQL helper thread from PR #295 by eliminating the generic GraphQL error helper and returning sanitized JSONResponse objects directly.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Removed the generic graphql_error helper and replaced both call sites with direct sanitized JSONResponse objects. Local py_compile and flake8 E9/F63/F7/F82 passed for services/private-graphql-proxy/proxy/app.py.
